channel.title: eCyPro Premium Consulting Blog
channel.description: Insights on Strategic Management, Digital Transformation, and Corporate Leadership.

item.title: GDPR vs. KVKK: A Comparative Analysis for Turkish Companies
item.description: The key differences between GDPR and KVKK: penalty calculation, scope, data subject rights, and cross-border data transfer. A practical guide for Turkish companies doing business with the EU.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Consulting)

item.title: The KVKK Compliance Process: A Step-by-Step Corporate Guide (2026)
item.description: How should an organization launch a KVKK compliance program? A seven-step corporate guide to mandatory documentation, KVKK penalties, and common pitfalls.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Consulting)

item.title: Carbon Accounting: First Steps for Scope 1–3
item.description: The first steps a company should take across the Scope 1, 2, and 3 categories when building a carbon accounting function from scratch, with practical data-collection guidance.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (Mehmet Çelik)

item.title: CSRD Compliance: A 2026 Action Plan
item.description: A step-by-step action plan for Turkish companies expected to align with the EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) by 2026.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (Mehmet Çelik)

item.title: Data Governance and KVKK/GDPR Compliance: A Corporate Data Strategy Framework
item.description: In 2024, Türkiye's Personal Data Protection Authority (KVKK) imposed more than 550 million Turkish lira in administrative fines for infringements of the personal-data law. In Europe…
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Analiz Ekibi)

item.title: ESG Strategy and Corporate Sustainability: A C-Suite Guide for 2026
item.description: ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) criteria have risen to the top of the corporate governance agenda over the past decade. This guide offers executives an evidence-based, actionable framework for embedding ESG strategy into the corporate value chain.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Analiz Ekibi)

item.title: M&A Due Diligence: Valuation Methodology for Corporate Mergers and Acquisitions
item.description: McKinsey & Company's comprehensive research finds that nearly 70% of M&A transactions fail to achieve the revenue synergies projected by the acquirer's management (Christofferson et…
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Consulting)

item.title: Macroeconomic Risk Management: Corporate Strategy Under Currency, Inflation, and Interest-Rate Pressure
item.description: Between 2024 and 2026, the global economic environment presents corporate leaders with an unusual degree of uncertainty: structural inflation persistence in the United States…
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Analiz Ekibi)

item.title: How to Build a Digital Transformation Strategy: A Seven-Step Corporate Guide
item.description: Five mistakes to avoid when building a corporate digital transformation strategy, and the seven critical steps of a successful transformation.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Consulting)

item.title: Optimizing Business Processes with AI: An Enterprise Guide for 2026
item.description: The real ROI of generative AI in business processes, common implementation pitfalls, and a five-stage framework for enterprise AI transformation.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (eCyPro Consulting)

item.title: Measuring AI Investment ROI: The CFO Framework
item.description: A proven framework to quantify the real financial impact of AI projects. Cost-benefit analysis, risk quantification, and net value calculation.
item.author: info@ecypro.com (Dr. Emre Can)
